session.assistant:
**Result:** make prettier-fix failed
The Makefile does not have a `prettier-fix` target. The available prettier-related targets are:
- `make prettier` (lines 3-4) - Runs prettier in write mode to format markdown files - `make prettier-check` (lines 6-7) - Checks if markdown files conform to prettier formatting - `make fix` (lines 15-18) - Runs a complete fix that includes ruff formatting, ruff checking with fixes, and prettier formatting
If you want to fix prettier formatting issues, use: - `make prettier` - to format markdown files - `make fix` - to run the complete fix (includes prettier + ruff formatting)
